stemHtml:
Which of the four answers is a correct interpretation of data from the following METAR?

LSZH 050820Z 16003KT 0400 R14/P1500 R16/1000N FZFG VV003 M02/M02 Q1026 BECMG 2000 BR=

options.a: RVR for runway 16 1000 m with no distinct tendency, visibility increasing in the next 2 hours to 2000 m, vertical visibility 300 m, temperature -2°C.
options.b: Visibility 400 m, RVR for runway 16 1000 m with no distinct tendency, dew point -2°C, freezing fog.
options.c: RVR for runway 14 1500 m, visibility 400 m, QNH 1026 hPa, wind 160° at 3 kt.
options.d: Visibility 1000 m, RVR 400 m, freezing level at 300 m, variable winds, temperature 2°C.
